subcodes.first_line: The leaf of that handmaiden hath attained unto the Most Holy and Most Exalted Court, yet is not adorned with such mention as would gain the ear of the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقه آن امه بساحت امنع اقدس فائز ولکن بذکریکه باصغاء محبوب فائز شود مزین نه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @personal instructions, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
